title: Victories for Sussex and Pacs United in Premier League
description: CRICKET NEWS - Sussex and Pacaltsdorp United...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Sussex and Pacaltsdorp United recorded victories in the series of SWD Premier League matches that were played last weekend.


> Sussex (144/5) was victorious with a five-wicket bonus-point victory against Union Stars I (142 all out) at the Bridgton Sportsgrounds.


Sussex's Geon Burns (46 with the bat) and Jesse Lewis (4/28 with the ball) excelled.

Pacaltsdorp United (177 all out) weathered off a challenge from the Knysna Cavaliers (123 all out) and recorded a bonus-point victory - by 54 runs - at Loerie Park.

Leroi Bredenkamp (65) was the batting hero for Pacaltsdorp, while Anaxolo Kithsini (4/27) again impressed with the ball.

The matches in George between George and Union Stars II and New Dawn Park and the Harlequins Forces were both abandoned due to rain, and both teams log two points for a no-result match.


> The summarised scorecards:


Premier League

Union Stars I vs Sussex

Union Stars I 142 all out (47.5 overs) (Josh Karelse 37, Shannon Opperman 22*, Jesse Lewis 4/28, Franco Geldenhuys 2/20).

Sussex 144/5 (30.1 overs) (Geon Burns 46, Kevin Gibson 35*, Josh Karelse 3/40).

Sussex won by 5 wickets.

Knysna Cavaliers vs Pacaltsdorp United

Pacaltsdorp United 177 all out (45.2 overs) (Leroi Bredenkamp 65, Anoxolo Khitshini 31, Justin Meyer 2/21, Stefan May 2/26, AB van der Walt 2/38).

Knysna Cavaliers 123 all out (38.1 overs) (AB van der Walt 34, Anoxolo Khitshini 4/27, Ducayne Plaatjies 3/29, Ricardo Majolla 2/16).

Pacaltsdorp United won by 54 runs.

George vs Union Stars II

Match abandoned

New Dawn Park vs Harlequins Forces

Rescheduled

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
